steps.command: uv run python3 scripts/sessions.py index && uv run python3 scripts/session-shape.py --days 1 --json > artifacts/session-retro/shape-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).json 2>/dev/null || true

steps.prompt: Analyze today's sessions across all projects for behavioral anti-patterns: sycophancy, over-engineering, build-then-undo, token waste, search flooding. First check artifacts/session-retro/shape-YYYY-MM-DD.json (today's date) — if it exists, prioritize sessions flagged as anomalous. Use `uv run python3 scripts/sessions.py show <uuid>` to get compressed transcripts, then dispatch to Gemini for analysis. Write findings as JSON to artifacts/session-retro/YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today's date) with the schema: {findings: [{category, summary, severity, evidence, session_uuid, project, root_cause, proposed_fix}], sessions_analyzed, actionable_count}. Do NOT append directly to improvement-log.md. If orchestrator .metrics.jsonl files exist for today's tasks, include tool failure patterns in your analysis.

steps.command: uv run python3 scripts/fix-verify.py run --days 3 2>&1 | head -50 || true
